groups.add.heading: Add Group
groups.edit.heading: Edit Group
groups.package_prices.heading: Package prices
groups.package_prices.hint: Set the price for each listing when booked as part of this package. Leave blank to use the listing's own price.
groups.package_prices.no_listings: Add listings to this group to set their package prices.
groups.delete.heading: Delete Group
groups.delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the group {name} ({slug})?
groups.delete.listings_note: Listings in this group will not be deleted — they will be moved out of the group.
groups.delete.confirm_prompt: Type the group name to confirm:
groups.fields.name: Group Name
groups.fields.max_attendees_hint: Limits total attendees across all listings in this group. Leave blank for no limit. Works best when all listings in the group are the same type (daily or standard).
groups.fields.terms_hint: If set, overrides the global terms and conditions for this group ticket page
groups.running_totals_error_explanation: Expected values come from attendee rows in this group. Got values are the sum of stored running totals on the group's listings. Normal attendee changes keep these aligned; recalculate the affected listing totals before relying on group capacity or reporting.
groups.running_totals_error_title: Group listing totals do not match attendee rows.
